sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88516" key="prosa/mbasis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσάμβᾰσις</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">προσανάβασις</foreign> (q. v.).</entryFree>
